category_sources: source_facts.description says it adjusts volume of audio files; official Normalize homepage describes an audio file volume normalizer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is normalize; official nongnu homepage title is Normalize.
docs_sources: Official nongnu homepage links to the README for more information and FAQs; homepage itself is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official nongnu homepage provides release tarballs but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify audio volume normalization; official README discusses WAV and MP3 use cases.
